title: 京都大賞典の後に・実り

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Satono Diamond wins the race her way.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Not only did she run without a hitch, she ran more
powerfully than ever before. All of her training
has paid off.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
At long last, it's time for the autumn Tenno Sho!
It's time to take on Mejiro McQueen and Kitasan
Black!
